title: Reminder
description: Displays your saved notes immediately when you join a server you’ve written reminders for.
body:
Reminder

Never forget what you planned! Reminder shows your saved notes when you join a server.

## ⚡ How to Use
  • Join any server - if you have saved notes for it, Reminder will automatically display them when you enter the world.
  • Available commands (use /reminder in chat):
    • /reminder add <message> - Saves a new reminder for the current server.
    • /reminder edit <message> - Replaces all existing reminders for the current server.
    • /reminder delete - Removes all reminders for the current server.


## 🎨 Customization / Settings

You can adjust how your reminders appear by editing the Reminder.json file located in: config/Armandukx/

  • prefix - Text placed before every reminder. Supports Minecraft formatting (§ color/style codes).
  • onJoin - A header message shown when joining a server. Fully supports color codes and bold formatting.


## 📋 Features
  • Automatically displays your notes for each server upon joining.
  • Supports multiple servers, each with individual messages.
  • Customizable colors, bold text, and formatting for improved visibility.


## 🤝 Support

If you need help installing or configuring the mod, join our community:
